records.m_pText: Grandship
Err… Could I have a word$nwith you, [PCM2]?
What’s with the serious look?
Oh, no, it’s just, well…
*sigh*$nYou’re worried Grandship is on$nher last leg, aren’t you?
So you’ve noticed, too!
Sure, I’ve known.$nWe’ve entered the Holy Pillar$nfive times now.
Passing through that intense light$nand extreme turbulence, and$nweathering Airy’s monstrous attacks…
That would leave more than a$nfew scratches on any ship.
Yes, but “more than a few$nscratches” doesn’t even begin$nto describe the damage.
I know. It’s far more than some$ndamaged or worn-out parts.
The hull itself is not long for$nthis world.
If we suffer that kind of turbulence$nagain, this ship is sure to—
I know. But let’s just keep this$nbetween you and me for now.
Understood.
……$n*sigh*
Once This Is All Done…
So, what will everyone do once$nthis is all done and the Great$nChasm finally closes?
I think I’ll carry on with my$nfather’s wishes.
As a vestal of the crystals,$nI intend to keep guiding$nthe faithful.
…Hee hee.
What’s so funny,$n[PCF1]?
Well, I am the wind vestal and a$nfollower of Crystalism.
And you…you are the daughter of the$ngreat Braev the Templar, and naturally$nan adherent of Anticrystalism.
It seems strange that we would$njourney so far together, but in$nthe end, return to lives$nnaturally opposed.
Well, I for one intend to put$nconcepts like Crystalism and$nAnticrystalism in the past!
Really!?
Yes, I’ve made up my mind. I will$nseek to make the world a better$nplace—a world where we don’t$nneed to oppose each other.
I believe that is the sort of$nworld my father really sought.
…[PCF2]…$nI think so, too.
[PCM2],$nwhat will you do?
What else? Continue my never-$nending quest to find my$nideal woman.
Besides, I don’t have anywhere$nto go back to.
Come live in Eternia!
Don’t worry, I’ll put in a good$nword for you.
Hmm… It might be nice to have$nsomewhere I could call home.
What about you,$n[PCM1]?
Me? Oh, umm…
Once our adventure is over…
I think I’ll return to Norende$nVillage to live out the rest of$nmy life in peace.
Rather humdrum, huh?
No, it’s neither humdrum nor$nextraordinary.
That’s right, [PCM1].
I will be sure to come visit you$nin Norende, [PCM1].
…Once this is all done.
Thanks to You
At long last… Right, [PCF1]?
Yes, at long last…
Wrong way! That’s the trader$nover there!
Ha ha ha!$nI’m so happy, I can’t think!
[PCM1] and [PCF2]$nare just as excited as I,$nit appears.
It is thanks to you, [PCM2].$nYou saved [PCM1] on the$ncanyon road…
We were fortunate the dark$nknight Alternis Dim had$ninfiltrated Caldisla.
…So you knew about that?
But you do realize that was not me,$ndon’t you?
And the person I rescued was$n[PCM1] from the world$nbefore we met.
The [PCM1] who is$nwith us now…
He was saved by the Alternis Dim$nwe defeated in the first world.
And the person you spoke with$nwhen you reached Caldisla,$ntoo, was no doubt—
Even so, we still owe$na debt to you.
For you are who brought us$nall together.
And after we left Caldisla,$nwe have been traveling the world,$nguided by your mysterious journal.
[PCM2], it is all thanks to you.
Really? Well, Alternis would’ve$nbeen happy to hear that, too.
[PCF1], [PCM2],$nhurry!$nLet’s go take a look!
Coming!
Let’s go, [PCF1].
Yes, let us go.
Alternis’s Memory
Oh, I see… Phoenix Flight and$nMinus Strike.
Huh?
Oh, no, I was just thinking back$nto when I was still the dark$nknight Alternis Dim.
Barras said something to me back then.$nHe said…
“My Phoenix Flight and your$nMinus Strike are the$nultimate combination.”
You sacrifice HP for major$ndamage with Phoenix Flight,$nthen you do as much damage as$nyour HP loss with Minus Strike…
Hmm, that could be interesting!$nYou could even have multiple$npairings like that in a party.
It’s worth a try! And if there$nwere a way to add some major$nhealing after the Minus Strike,$nit would be icing on the cake.
Let us try to find something of$nthat sort.
We were both really excited about it$nback then, even though neither of us$nhad mastered the moves yet.
Holly was there with us too…
I think it was her suggestion to$nuse the freelancer’s Stand Ground$nuntil she could follow up with healing.
[PCM2]…
Are We Dreaming?
I wonder if we aren’t all in a$ndream right now.
I mean, the Great Chasm is still$nopen and the sea is back to the$nway it was before.
How else would you explain it if$nit weren’t a dream?
But you don’t normally know you’re$ndreaming while you’re in the$nmiddle of a dream, right?
At least, when I dream, I don’t$nrealize it until I wake up.
Do you mean a dreamlike state,$nlike a trance or such, or do you$nmean an actual dream?
[PCF2], would you mind$nkissing me on the cheek?
Why!? Don’t think you can$nhave your way just because$nthis is a dream!
No, don’t take it the wrong way.$nI want to check whether this$nreally is a dream or not.
Now, I’ll just close my eyes$nwhile you pucker up and plant$none right here!
Yeeeouuuch!
The pinch test is how you check$nwhether you’re dreaming or not!
Alright, alright!$nThis isn’t a dream!
Long Live the Glutton Queen!
Ahhh… Caldislan seafood cuisine$nis positively divine!
Each one is a festival of freshness!$nSo juicy and full of flavor!
Ooh, my mouth won’t stop watering$njust thinking about it. It must be$nso nice to live in a port town!
[PCF2], your appetite is$nbeyond impressive.$nIt’s downright scary.
Grilled Caldislan mackerel,$nbuccaneer marlin sauté,$ntricolor crab steamed right in$nits shell…
…stewed buckler flounder,$nsweet salmon sashimi,$nroast king tuna—
Not only that, she said the gold cod$nstew I ordered looked delicious,$nthen ended up eating over half of it!
She even ate the fried$nbroad cutlassfish I was$nunable to finish.
How could you possibly eat that$nmuch and live? How does your$nstomach feel right now?
Just a bit uncomfortable,$nha ha…
I’m more worried about how far$nmy belly is sticking out.
Well, you’re a growing girl.$nYou’ll work it off as long$nas you stay active.
Ah!!!
What!? What!?
I forgot about the grilled squid!
I bet it’s positively divine!$nCome on, let’s go. Hurry!
……$n…I think she really means it.
…Heh heh…
Wavering of Purpose
This is the nineteenth time…
[PCF1]…$nHow much more—
Remember, [PCF2],$nwe decided to follow$n[PCF1] on this.
…Oh, that’s right.
Wait for You
Ah!
What is it?
My pendant chain!
You’re right. It looks like it was$nabout to come off.
Here, let me have a look.
Oh, this will be easy enough to$nfix once we get back to Grandship.
Thank you.
You’re handier than you look,$n[PCM2].
Did you have to include that$n“than you look” part?
What are you guys doing back there?$nI’m going to leave without you!
Never fear, I’ll keep waiting for$nyou. Thousands of years, even!
Huh? What are you babbling$nabout, [PCM2]?
Yes, what do you mean?
Huh?$nWhat do you mean, what do I mean?
Oh, will you just come along already!
Chili Pepper Powder
Brrrrrr! It’s freezing!
It seems like this place is$nalways snowbound.
I can’t feel the tips$nof my toes anymore.$nI don’t care if it’s my homeland;$nI can’t stand this weather!
[PCM2], could I borrow your$nbottle of crushed red pepper?
My red pepper? What does that$nhave to do with anything?
You have it, right?$nThat pepper you bought$nback in Ancheim?
Yes, I have it, but I didn’t know$nthat you knew I had it. Here.
Thanks. Now, to fold a bunch$ninto these cloths here…
[PCF2], take off your shoes$nand stuff these cloths$ninto the toes.
Oh, but first, you don’t have any$ninjuries to the tips of your$ntoes, do you?
No, but…
Ah! My toes! They feel all warm$nand toasty!
Now you too, [PCF1].
What a handy bit of knowledge.$nThank you, [PCM1].
Yes, well, Norende also$nexperiences quite heavy$nsnowfall in winter.
Everyone in the village always$nhad chili pepper powder in their$nboots. Oh, and thanks, [PCM2].$nHere’s your pepper back.
Ahh… My red pepper. Is this all$nthat’s left? *sigh*
Ancheim’s Super Spicy Cuisine
Oh, that was positively divine!
It’s good to know that Ancheim’s$nsuper spicy cuisine is going strong$nhere in this world, too!
It sure is!$nI mean, I’m covered in sweat!$nI feel like I’ve been in a sauna.
I can’t believe you both could$nhandle “extra spicy.”$nI wouldn’t dare to try.
Nor I. But I have figured$nout one thing of late.
Ice cream is simply wonderful$nafter a spicy meal.
You know, you’re right.$nBut even without that,$nI feel as if I cool down$njust a bit after a spicy meal.
Oh, it’s more than a feeling.$nAs the sweat evaporates,$nit actually does cool the body.
That makes it perfect for Ancheim,$nthe land blessed by a constant zephyr$nfrom the Temple of Wind.
So that must be why spicy$ncuisine took root here in$nthis hot desert land.
Exactly.$nNow, on to the next place!
Alright, bring it on!
What!? Spicy restaurant hopping!?$nI don’t know if I can handle this…
